title: Bounded Worker Pool, Origin Fairness, Cancellation, and Shutdown · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded origin-aware ingestion worker pool and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Derive global, tenant, origin, database, memory, and queue budgets and enforce the minimum active constraint.
Assign producers, closers, receivers, buffers, and terminal states so sends, closes, and drains cannot race or block forever.
Prevent one publisher from consuming all slots while preserving useful throughput and explicit per-origin limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Concurrency Budget
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 2952 during a publisher-fairness incident rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove bounded origin-aware worker ownership, failure isolation, cancellation, and joined shutdown; untrusted XML and feed content must not cross admission or rendering boundaries; then change one schema, constraint, transaction, upsert, migration, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Derive global, tenant, origin, database, memory, and queue budgets and enforce the minimum active constraint.

Inspect the Feed Go Concurrency Budget trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Concurrency Budget.

For Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Concurrency Budget, keep Feed Go Concurrency Budget connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
